bodyHtml:
研究对象: ALB

财务数据

口径说明

项目 说明
研究对象 ALB 指 Albemarle Corporation，本文仅分析 ALB。[S1]
报表期间 三年趋势使用截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日、2024 年 12 月 31 日、2023 年 12 月 31 日的年度数据。[S1]
金额单位 除特别说明外，金额单位为 $ million；ALB Form 10-K 披露单位为 $ thousands，本文按 $ thousands / 1,000 换算为 $ million。[S1][自测算]
利润口径 “净利润”在趋势表中采用 Net (loss) income attributable to Albemarle Corporation；现金流质量表中采用合并 Net (loss) income，以便与经营现金流量表口径一致。[S1]
行业均值口径 行业对比采用 NYU Stern / Damodaran 的 U.S. Chemical (Specialty) 行业，样本公司数为 59 家，数据日期为 January 2026。[S2][S3]

1. 三年收入、净利润、毛利率、净利率趋势

年度 净销售额 毛利 归属于 Albemarle Corporation 净利润 毛利率 净利率 主要观察
2025 $5,142.733 million [S1] $668.719 million [S1] $(510.628) million [S1] 13.0% [自测算：$668.719 million / $5,142.733 million] (9.9)% [自测算：$(510.628) million / $5,142.733 million] 收入较 2024 年的 $5,377.526 million [S1]继续下降，归母净利润仍为亏损但亏损额较 2024 年的 $(1,179.449) million [S1]收窄。[自测算]
2024 $5,377.526 million [S1] $62.539 million [S1] $(1,179.449) million [S1] 1.2% [自测算：$62.539 million / $5,377.526 million] (21.9)% [自测算：$(1,179.449) million / $5,377.526 million] 毛利率跌至 1.2% [自测算：$62.539 million / $5,377.526 million]，同时经营亏损为 $(1,776.545) million [S1]。
2023 $9,617.203 million [S1] ,185.909 million [S1] ,573.476 million [S1] 12.3% [自测算：,185.909 million / $9,617.203 million] 16.4% [自测算：,573.476 million / $9,617.203 million] 2023 年归母净利润为正，且权益法投资收益为 ,854.082 million [S1]，显著抬升净利润率。[自测算]

2. ROE / ROA / ROIC 分析

指标 2025 2024 计算口径 解读
ROE (5.2)% [自测算：$(510.628) million / (($9,533.365 million + $9,961.517 million) / 2)] (12.2)% [自测算：$(1,179.449) million / (($9,961.517 million + $9,412.180 million) / 2)] 分子为归属于 Albemarle Corporation 净利润；分母为期初期末 Albemarle Corporation shareholders' equity 平均值，相关输入来自 ALB 10-K。[S1] 2025 年 ROE 仍为负值，但较 2024 年改善 7.0 个百分点。[自测算：(5.2)% - (12.2)%]
ROA (2.8)% [自测算：$(465.210) million / ((6,374.211 million + 6,609.649 million) / 2)] (6.5)% [自测算：$(1,135.477) million / ((6,609.649 million + 8,270.652 million) / 2)] 分子为合并 Net (loss) income；分母为期初期末 Total assets 平均值，相关输入来自 ALB 10-K。[S1] 2025 年资产回报仍为负，但亏损率较 2024 年收窄 3.7 个百分点。[自测算：(2.8)% - (6.5)%]
ROIC (3.1)% [自测算：$(367.084) million / ((($3,193.541 million + $9,781.461 million - ,618.001 million) + ($3,516.165 million + 0,199.688 million - ,192.230 million)) / 2)] (14.0)% [自测算：$(1,776.545) million / ((($3,516.165 million + 0,199.688 million - ,192.230 million) + ($4,166.763 million + $9,665.099 million - $889.900 million)) / 2)] ROIC 使用经营利润 / 平均投入资本；投入资本按 Total long-term debt + Total equity - Cash and cash equivalents 估算，2025 年与 2024 年输入来自 ALB 2025 Form 10-K，2023 年 Total long-term debt 来自 ALB 2024 Form 10-K。[S1][S4] 2025 年经营口径 ROIC 较 2024 年改善 10.9 个百分点，但仍为负值。[自测算：(3.1)% - (14.0)%]

3. 杠杆与偿债能力指标

指标 2025 2024 计算口径 解读
现金及现金等价物 ,618.001 million [S1] ,192.230 million [S1] 资产负债表 Cash and cash equivalents。[S1] 2025 年现金较 2024 年增加 $425.771 million。[自测算：,618.001 million - ,192.230 million]
总债务 $3,193.541 million [S1] $3,516.165 million [S1] Total long-term debt，含一年内到期部分。[S1] 2025 年总债务较 2024 年下降 $322.624 million。[自测算：$3,193.541 million - $3,516.165 million]
净债务 ,575.540 million [自测算：$3,193.541 million - ,618.001 million] $2,323.935 million [自测算：$3,516.165 million - ,192.230 million] 总债务 - 现金及现金等价物。[S1] 净债务减少 $748.395 million。[自测算：,575.540 million - $2,323.935 million]
总债务 / 总资产 19.5% [自测算：$3,193.541 million / 6,374.211 million] 21.2% [自测算：$3,516.165 million / 6,609.649 million] 总债务 / Total assets。[S1] 杠杆率下降 1.7 个百分点。[自测算：19.5% - 21.2%]
净债务 / 总权益 16.1% [自测算：,575.540 million / $9,781.461 million] 22.8% [自测算：$2,323.935 million / 0,199.688 million] 净债务 / Total equity。[S1] 净债务权益压力较 2024 年下降 6.7 个百分点。[自测算：16.1% - 22.8%]
流动比率 2.23x [自测算：$4,008.139 million / ,798.044 million] 1.95x [自测算：$3,842.262 million / ,966.464 million] Total current assets / Total current liabilities。[S1] 2025 年流动比率高于 2024 年，短期流动性改善。[自测算]
一年内到期长期债务 $74.077 million [S1] $398.023 million [S1] Current portion of long-term debt。[S1] 2025 年一年内到期长期债务较 2024 年减少 $323.946 million。[自测算：$74.077 million - $398.023 million]
债务契约与备用流动性 ALB 披露截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日具备 .5 billion 商业票据和 2022 Credit Agreement 借款能力，以及 04.5 million 其他现有信贷额度，并认为截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日且报告时仍遵守债务契约。[S1] N/A [S1] 管理层流动性披露。[S1] 备用额度和契约合规为偿债提供补充缓冲。[S1]

4. 现金流质量：OCF / 净利润

年度 合并净利润 经营活动现金流 OCF 资本开支 自由现金流 FCF OCF / 净利润 OCF / 净销售额 现金流质量判断
2025 $(465.210) million [S1] ,282.267 million [S1] $(589.801) million [S1] $692.466 million [自测算：,282.267 million + $(589.801) million] (2.76)x [自测算：,282.267 million / $(465.210) million] 24.9% [自测算：,282.267 million / $5,142.733 million] 净利润为负但 OCF 为正，主要现金流质量好于损益表利润表观。[自测算]
2024 $(1,135.477) million [S1] $687.876 million [S1] $(1,680.529) million [S1] $(992.653) million [自测算：$687.876 million + $(1,680.529) million] (0.61)x [自测算：$687.876 million / $(1,135.477) million] 12.8% [自测算：$687.876 million / $5,377.526 million] OCF 为正但资本开支较高，FCF 为负。[自测算]
2023 ,670.543 million [S1] ,326.583 million [S1] $(2,154.542) million [S1] $(827.959) million [自测算：,326.583 million + $(2,154.542) million] 0.79x [自测算：,326.583 million / ,670.543 million] 13.8% [自测算：,326.583 million / $9,617.203 million] 盈利为正但资本开支超过 OCF，FCF 为负。[自测算]

5. 关键财务指标与行业均值对比

指标 ALB 2025 U.S. Chemical (Specialty) 行业均值 差异 口径说明 结论
毛利率 13.0% [自测算：$668.719 million / $5,142.733 million] 35.12% [S2] (22.1) 个百分点 [自测算：13.0% - 35.12%] ALB 为 2025 年毛利 / 净销售额；行业为 NYU Stern / Damodaran January 2026 Chemical (Specialty) Gross Margin。[S1][S2] ALB 毛利率显著低于行业均值。[自测算]
净利率 (9.9)% [自测算：$(510.628) million / $5,142.733 million] 2.91% [S2] (12.8) 个百分点 [自测算：(9.9)% - 2.91%] ALB 为归属于 Albemarle Corporation 净利润 / 净销售额；行业为 NYU Stern / Damodaran January 2026 Chemical (Specialty) Net Margin。[S1][S2] ALB 2025 年仍亏损，低于行业正净利率。[自测算]
经营口径 ROIC / Return on Capital (3.1)% [自测算：$(367.084) million / 1,940.312 million 平均投入资本] 11.89% [S3] (15.0) 个百分点 [自测算：(3.1)% - 11.89%] ALB 为经营利润 / 平均投入资本；行业为 NYU Stern / Damodaran January 2026 Chemical (Specialty) Return on Capital。[S1][S3] ALB 投入资本回报低于行业，核心原因是 2025 年经营利润为负。[S1][自测算]
Adjusted EBITDA / 净销售额 21.4% [自测算：,097.993 million / $5,142.733 million] 18.01% [S2] 3.4 个百分点 [自测算：21.4% - 18.01%] ALB 为 Total adjusted EBITDA / 净销售额；行业为 NYU Stern / Damodaran Chemical (Specialty) EBITDA/Sales。[S1][S2] 调整后 EBITDA 利润率高于行业均值，但该指标剔除了折旧摊销、减值、重组等项目，需与 GAAP 净亏损并读。[S1][自测算]
销售 / 投入资本 0.43x [自测算：$5,142.733 million / 1,940.312 million 平均投入资本] 1.11x [S3] (0.68)x [自测算：0.43x - 1.11x] ALB 投入资本按 Total long-term debt + Total equity - Cash and cash equivalents 估算；行业为 NYU Stern / Damodaran Chemical (Specialty) Sales / Invested Capital。[S1][S3] ALB 资产与资本周转低于行业均值。[自测算]

资料来源 / Sources

[S1] U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, Albemarle Corporation 2025 Form 10-K — https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/915913/000091591326000018/alb-20251231.htm

[S2] NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran, Operating and Net Margins by Sector (US), data as of January 2026 — https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/margin.html

[S3] NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran, Margins and ROIC by Sector (US), data as of January 2026 — https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/mgnroc.html

[S4] U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, Albemarle Corporation 2024 Form 10-K — https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/915913/000091591325000026/alb-20241231.htm
